releases.author: saertna
releases.description:
## New
- Profile is transferred to right side leaf
  - Enable through settings or with command 'Open Profile Leaf'
  - Set a picture from vault as Avatar Profile picture
  - adjust in Settings with Color Picker bar colors to layout
  
## What's Changed
* In Dataview plugin Settings 'Inline Queries', 'JavaScript Queries' and 'Inline JavaScript Queries' can be disabled. They are not needed anymore to display the maturity count table. 
* Avatar Markdown File is obsolete and is not actualized anymore
* Badges are not shown anymore. They are still saved (since release #54) and be shown again in a later release
* In- and Out-Links will be counted with Dataview when Dataview is installed
* Removed Magic Numbers for Times by @saertna in https://github.com/saertna/obsidian-gamified-pkm/pull/74
* Refactoring interfaces obsidian by @saertna in https://github.com/saertna/obsidian-gamified-pkm/pull/75
* profile page as Leaf by @saertna in https://github.com/saertna/obsidian-gamified-pkm/pull/76


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/saertna/obsidian-gamified-pkm/compare/0.0.90...0.0.91
releases.name: Gamified-PKM 0.0.91

releases.description:
Release for Beta Testing. Plugin can be used for operational use. Final release may have finedtuned values for the game mechanics, depending on feedback.
Follow the installation advise in the [readme](https://github.com/saertna/obsidian-gamified-pkm/tree/0.0.8-beta.2#readme)
